citations.quote:
Period of Let:
From:                                                  To:

Rent:        £               Total for Session (including £500 “the Advance Payment”)
The tenant will pay the Rent instalments on the due dates as advised by the Accommodation Office.
If the Tenant’s Rent instalments account falls into arrears, the Landlord will be entitled to seek payment from the Tenant’s guarantor
Where a Rent account is in arrears by two monthly instalments, the Landlord will be entitled to issue a notice to quit

findings.text: The tenancy agreement template (NAP-SRC-0018) is blank: no tenant name, signature, dates, or rent amount completed.
Rent is payable by monthly instalments on dates advised by the Accommodation Office.
Landlord may seek payment from guarantor if rent account falls into arrears.
Landlord may issue a 28-day notice to quit if arrears reach two monthly instalments.

proposed_artifacts.content: Task t-001: Obtain completed tenancy agreement for Anfal. The only source provided (NAP-SRC-0018) is a blank template. No completed version for Anfal is in the evidence. The template shows standard terms: monthly rent instalments, guarantor liability, 28-day notice to quit after two months arrears, £500 advance payment. To proceed, a completed and signed tenancy agreement for Anfal must be obtained from the Accommodation Office or student records. Proposed follow-up: search for a completed agreement in other sources or request from human operator.
proposed_artifacts.title: t-001 findings: completed tenancy agreement not available

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search matter sources and artifacts for a completed and signed tenancy agreement naming Anfal as tenant. Check for any scanned PDFs, emails, or records from the Accommodation Office. If not found, request human operator to obtain from Edinburgh Napier University.
proposed_tasks.title: Locate completed tenancy agreement for Anfal

risk_flags.text: Without a completed tenancy agreement, the specific rent amount, due dates, and tenant identity for Anfal cannot be confirmed.
The source document is a candidate (unverified) PDF; chain of custody validation is required.
If the completed agreement contains different terms (e.g., different arrears notice period), reliance on the template alone may be misleading.

summary: Reviewed extracted text of NAP-SRC-0018 (Tenancy Agreement 2025-26). The document is a blank template with no tenant name, signature, dates, or rent amount filled in. It cannot serve as a completed tenancy agreement for Anfal. The extraction is partial (excerpt truncated at 6000 chars). A completed version is needed.

uncertainties.text: The completed tenancy agreement for Anfal (with tenant name, dates, rent, and signatures) is not in the provided source materials.
The extracted text is truncated at 6000 characters; full terms and conditions may contain additional relevant clauses.
It is unclear whether Anfal signed a guarantor agreement or whether a guarantor was named.
